호세아 11:1.content: “When Israel was a child, then I loved him, and called my son out of Egypt.

호세아 11:2.content: They called to them, so they went from them. They sacrificed to the Baals, and burned incense to engraved images.

호세아 11:3.content: Yet I taught Ephraim to walk. I took them by his arms; but they didn’t know that I healed them.

호세아 11:4.content: I drew them with cords of a man, with ties of love; and I was to them like those who lift up the yoke on their necks; and I bent down to him and I fed him.

호세아 11:5.content: “They won’t return into the land of Egypt; but the Assyrian will be their king, because they refused to repent.

호세아 11:6.content: The sword will fall on their cities, and will destroy the bars of their gates, and will put an end to their plans.

호세아 11:7.content: My people are determined to turn from me. Though they call to the Most High, he certainly won’t exalt them.

호세아 11:8.content: “How can I give you up, Ephraim? How can I hand you over, Israel? How can I make you like Admah? How can I make you like Zeboiim? My heart is turned within me, my compassion is aroused.

호세아 11:9.content: I will not execute the fierceness of my anger. I will not return to destroy Ephraim: for I am God, and not man; the Holy One among you; and I will not come in wrath.

호세아 11:10.content: They will walk after Yahweh, who will roar like a lion; for he will roar, and the children will come trembling from the west.

호세아 11:11.content: They will come trembling like a bird out of Egypt, and like a dove out of the land of Assyria; and I will settle them in their houses,” says Yahweh.

호세아 11:12.content: Ephraim surrounds me with falsehood, and the house of Israel with deceit. Judah still strays from God, and is unfaithful to the Holy One.
